tools.name: companyInfo.getCompanyInfo
tools.description:
Retrieve information about the company, as seen in the commerce platform.

This may include information like addresses, tax registration details and social media or website information.

tools.name: customers.listCustomers
tools.description: List all commerce customers for the given company and data connection

tools.name: locations.listLocations
tools.description:
Retrieve a list of locations as seen in the commerce platform.

A `location` is a geographic place at which stocks of products may be held, or from where orders were placed.

tools.name: orders.listOrders
tools.description: Get a list of orders placed or held on the linked commerce platform

tools.name: payments.listPaymentMethods
tools.description: Retrieve a list of payment methods, such as card, cash or other online payment methods, as held in the linked commerce platform.

tools.name: payments.listPayments
tools.description: List commerce payments for the given company & data connection.

tools.name: products.listProductCategories
tools.description: Product categories are used to classify a group of products together, either by type (eg "Furniture"), or sometimes by tax profile.

tools.name: products.listProducts
tools.description: The Products data type provides the company's product inventory, and includes the price and quantity of all products, and product variants, available for sale.

tools.name: taxComponents.getTaxComponents
tools.description: This endpoint returns a lits of tax rates from the commerce platform, including tax rate names and values. This supports the mapping of tax rates from the commerce platform to the accounting platform.

tools.name: transactions.listTransactions
tools.description: Details of all financial transactions recorded in the commerce or point of sale system are added to the Transactions data type. For example, payments, service charges, and fees.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
